name: seven-pyramid-wine-catalog
description: Static site generator for Seven Pyramid wine catalog with 2000+ wine records and SEO optimization
author: Seven Pyramid Wine Import Business

scripts.build:dev: node build-wine-catalog.js && echo 'Build completed. Open generated/wine_list.html to preview.'
scripts.generate-sitemap: node build-wine-catalog.js && echo 'Sitemap generated at generated/sitemap.xml'
scripts.deploy: npm run build:wine && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: cp -r css img js generated/ && cp favicon.ico generated/ && cp site.webmanifest generated/
scripts.lint: echo 'Linting wine data structure...' && node validate-wine-data.js
scripts.csp-check: echo 'Checking for CSP violations...' && grep -r 'on[a-z]*=' *.html || echo 'No inline event handlers found - CSP compliant!'
scripts.deploy-help: echo '📋 Deployment Help:' && echo '1. Run: npm run prepare-deploy' && echo '2. Upload deploy/ folder contents to your web server' && echo '3. Test your website' && echo '4. See DEPLOYMENT-GUIDE.md for details'
